title: Sensor waivers
description: Human-granted overrides for hard-block hooks (BRD v3.2.3). Waived enforcements emit a stderr audit line and do not block. Each entry MUST have a granter and an expiry.

subject.description: Hook-specific string identifying the exact enforcement this waiver overrides. For pre-bash-gate: file path being written. For detect-secrets: file:line. Check the hook's head comment for its subject format.

granted_by.description: Who granted the waiver — human name, email, or role.

granted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the waiver was granted.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the waiver ceases to apply. Every waiver MUST expire — indefinite waivers are code changes, not waivers. Common values: 24h, 7d, 30d from granted_at.

audit_ref.description: Optional link to a PR, issue, or Slack thread where the waiver was discussed.
